# run-action

Invoke this workflow explicitly as `$rn-dev-agent:run-action [request text]`.

The exact text after the skill mention is the conceptual **request**. It is user-message data, not a shell variable or a Claude command-template substitution. Preserve it while applying the workflow's documented grammar; pass only separately parsed and validated values to MCP tools or package helpers. Never use `eval` or interpolate the raw request into a shell command.

Read [the complete package-local workflow](../../commands/run-action.md) before acting. Resolve that file and every helper relative to this exact `SKILL.md` path; never scan Codex caches or rely on a plugin-root environment variable. If a required `cdp` MCP tool is absent from the active task, stop and use the read-only discovery diagnosis. Do not substitute raw Maestro for rn-dev-agent strict proof.
